title: benstonea alticola
intro: Benstonea alticola is a flowering plant species in the family Pandanaceae, native to the tropical regions of Borneo. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its saponin content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Benstonea alticola include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate skin conditions, wounds, and other infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
